reasoning: The crypto regulatory tailwind (GENIUS Act) is real and structural — Circle benefits as the regulated stablecoin. But the valuation at 97x forward with no net income is pure speculation. At 0.7% of portfolio, this is a lottery ticket on stablecoin adoption. The 28% loss is painful but immaterial. Hold for the long-term stablecoin thesis. ENTRY/EXIT CONDITIONS: Do NOT add at current levels. Exit if stock breaks below $50 (52-week low). Consider adding only if path to profitability becomes clear.

bullCase: Circle (USDC issuer) beat Q4 EPS by 187% ($0.43 vs $0.15), revenue $770M (+77% YoY). USDC circulation grew 72%. GENIUS Act regulatory clarity is a massive competitive moat vs Tether. Higher rates boost reserve income. Analyst consensus Buy with avg target $124-126 (36% upside). Analyst Bernstein at $190.
